summary: High‑energy second set with a soaring Dark Star, captured in clear sound comparable to the famed 6/17/91 show.
review: The reviewer praises the second set’s cool opening and an inspiring Dark Star, saying the recording sounds as vibrant as the well‑known 6/17/91 performance. While no explicit technical details are given, the comparison implies a clean, balanced capture that lets the musical excitement shine through.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 5‑star review highlights strong performance (especially Dark Star) and suggests good audio quality, leading to a high rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes the sound is "as sonic" as the renowned 6/17/91 recording, implying clear and balanced audio despite no explicit source type mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set opens with a cool flair and builds into an exciting Dark Star, creating strong momentum for the remainder of the show.
